queries.query: What is the single source of truth for the project's technology stack catalog?
expected_titles: ProjectTechnology is the single source of truth for the project tech-stack catalog

queries.query: How can an assistant update a project's language through MCP?
expected_titles: rag_update_project MCP tool: how the LLM sets project languages

queries.query: Why must the web container be restarted together with the app container?
expected_titles: Restarting only the app container 502s the stack — rag-web (nginx) caches the app upstream IP; restart web too

queries.query: When is project_paths used to resolve a project from cwd?
expected_titles: project_paths is only read for cwd-based project resolution on the bare /mcp/rag route — dormant under the scoped /mcp/rag/{project} URL
